actionUnits.condition: Target MonoBehaviour (script_fileID: 764083142, guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) matches AttachToElevator and has field 'player' currently null in scene. BoxCollider id 764083144 has m_IsTrigger=0 and the object has no Rigidbody (Has_Rigidbody=false). AttachToElevator only reacts to Physics trigger messages OnTriggerEnter/OnTriggerExit; there are no public no-arg methods or UnityEvent m_Calls to invoke. To actually exercise OnTriggerEnter/Exit and cover the code, prerequisites are required: (1) set BoxCollider.isTrigger to true, and (2) ensure either platform2 (1) or the Player has a Rigidbody, and (3) assign the 'player' reference in this component to the intended Player GameObject. Note: current script compares 'gameObject == player' instead of 'other.gameObject == player'; to hit the code path without changing code, the 'player' field would need to be set to this same GameObject (platform2 (1)), otherwise the SetParent/parent=null lines will not execute. There are no UnityEvent m_Calls defined in the scene MonoBehaviour to trigger automatically.
